subject_profile.summary: Base country-level assessment; default category weights prioritize rule of law, institutional integrity, and personal freedom.
stated_values: Rule of law and institutional integrity weighted most heavily
Personal freedom and security from arbitrary state action are foundational
Economic success is contingent on rule of law, not a substitute for it

flags: Generated 2026-05-28 under v2.0: governance/rights rebuilt from independent sources (World Bank/UN estimates, V-Dem, RSF, Freedom House, HRW, Amnesty, OHCHR/UNAMA, ACLED) + exile press; Taliban regime claims EXCLUDED on governance/rights/statistics.
Data limitation: official statistics collapsed after 2021, so economic figures are external estimates and confidence is reduced.

Standout drags: a Taliban theocracy with gender apartheid, a collapsed aid-dependent economy, a frozen-reserves/sanctions isolation, and a severe climate/health catastrophe. Overall: clearly negative.

economic.notes: A collapsed, aid-dependent, sanctioned economy with frozen reserves.

fiscal_state.notes: A post-2021 collapse, aid- and UN-cash-dependent, with ~$9bn reserves frozen abroad and sanctioned. (World Bank estimates)

monetary_independence.notes: The central bank is cut off from the global system with reserves frozen - isolated and constrained. (World Bank)

inflation.notes: The afghani is oddly stable but volatile, with deflation giving way to mild inflation. (World Bank)

banking_stability.notes: Broken and SWIFT-cut, with the formal sector barely functioning. (World Bank/UN)

trade_actions_capacity.notes: Subsistence agriculture and unexploited mining, with the opium ban shifting to meth - isolated and aid-dependent. (World Bank/UNODC)

institutional.notes: A Taliban theocracy with no recognized rule of law, collapsed data, and among the worst press repression.

rule_of_law.notes: A Taliban theocracy ruling by Sharia edict, with no recognized rule of law. (V-Dem/Freedom House bottom; UNAMA)

statistical_integrity.notes: Official data collapsed and unusable; estimates come from external bodies. (World Bank)

civil_service_capacity.notes: Collapsed and gender-purged, with capacity gutted. (UNDP/World Bank)

press_freedom.notes: Near the RSF bottom, with live political broadcasts banned and journalists detained. (RSF/CPJ; HRW 2026)

political_social.notes: Consolidated but unrecognized Taliban control, gender apartheid, and a refugee-producing humanitarian catastrophe.

political_stability.notes: Consolidated Taliban control with no organized challenger - suppressed stability - but internationally unrecognized, with ISKP attacks and succession risk. (ICG)

civil_liberties.notes: Gender apartheid - women banned from education beyond grade six, work, and public life - among the world's worst. (HRW; Amnesty; OHCHR; UN Women)

treatment_non_citizens.notes: Refugee-producing, with millions of forced returns absorbed amid crisis. (UNHCR/IOM)

social_cohesion.notes: Repressed, with Pashtun-dominated tensions and a humanitarian catastrophe. (OCHA; HRW)

demographics.notes: Very young and high-fertility, but a human-capital catastrophe from the female-education ban. (UN; HRW)

geopolitical.notes: Isolated and largely unrecognized, with active border conflicts and frozen reserves.

alliance_reliability.notes: Largely unrecognized, with pragmatic China/Russia/Gulf engagement - isolated. (ICG)

conflict_involvement.notes: An ISKP insurgency plus 2025-26 Pakistan/TTP border clashes and an Iran water dispute. (HSToday; Lowy)

sanctions_capital_controls.notes: Heavily sanctioned, with reserves frozen and capital isolated. (US Treasury; World Bank)

physical_practical.notes: A severe climate and health catastrophe atop poor war-damaged infrastructure.

climate.notes: ND-GAIN bottom-decile vulnerability plus near-zero readiness - drought, glacier-fed water decline, flash floods. (ND-GAIN; WB CCDR)

healthcare.notes: Collapsed and aid-dependent, with among the world's worst maternal/child outcomes. (CARE/UNICEF/WHO)

crime_safety.notes: Taliban-imposed order cut some crime, but terrorism and instability persist. (HRW; HSToday)

summary: A Taliban theocracy ruling by Sharia edict with gender apartheid - women barred from education beyond grade six, from work, and from public life - among the world's worst rights environments. The economy collapsed after 2021: aid- and UN-cash-dependent, with central-bank reserves frozen abroad, a SWIFT-cut banking system, and heavy sanctions. Internationally unrecognized and isolated, with an ISKP insurgency and border clashes, atop extreme drought, deadly earthquakes, and a collapsed health system. Official data is gone, so figures are external estimates; the picture is clearly negative.
